name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for CrispyTivi
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem or limitation you're experiencing.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've thought about.

## Platform

Does this apply to a specific platform? (e.g., Android TV only,
Web only, all platforms)

## Additional Context

Any other information, mockups, or references that might help.
